_meta.purpose: Emotional warmth sentences in Hinglish. Used selectively — engine skips these sometimes. Real patient feelings about health improvement.
rules: Reference family, health journey, relief in Indian context
Mention ghar waale, maa, wife — very natural in Indian reviews
Short punchy sentences work better than long emotional paragraphs
3-star pool is intentionally tiny — almost never fires

5star: Sach mein bahut relief feel ho raha hai ab.
Ghar waale bhi bol rahe hain ki fark dikh raha hai.
Mahino ki problem thi, ab bahut better feel ho raha hoon.
Maa ne yahan aane ke liye bola tha, sahi kaha unhone.
Itne time baad health ke mamle mein hopeful feel kar raha hoon.
Chota chota improvement har hafte — yahi toh chahiye tha.
Saalon se itna accha feel nahi kiya tha.
Treatment pe trust banta ja raha hai dheere dheere.
Family ko bhi iska fark dikh raha hai jo mujhe bahut accha laga.
Jo peace of mind mili hai wo sabse zyada valuable hai.
Haat nahi maana is treatment se aur sahi kiya.
Puri zindagi badal gayi jaisi lag rahi hai — thoda dramatic lagega but sach hai.
Khud pe phir se confidence aa raha hai.
Bahut struggle kiya is problem ke saath, ab finally light dikh rahi hai.
Jab stone apne aap nikal gaya bina operation ke, aankhon mein aansu aa gaye.
Mahino ki takleef ke baad itni jaldi relief — describe karna mushkil hai.
Poora parivaar pareshan tha meri wajah se. Ab sab Dr. Verma ko dua dete hain.
Main sochta tha operation toh hoga hi. Dr. Verma ne sab galat sabit kar diya.
Itne doctors ke baad finally koi mila jisne actually problem solve ki.
Jis din stone nikla, maine sabse pehle Dr. Verma ko call kiya. Itna grateful hoon.
Zindagi mein pehli baar laga ki homeopathy sach mein kaam karti hai — woh bhi itni jaldi.
4star: Pehle se better feel ho raha hoon, yahi kaafi hai abhi.
Khush hoon ki yahan treatment lene ka decision liya.
Improvement dikh raha hai, dheera sahi par ho raha hai.
Thoda hopeful feel ho raha hai ab treatment ke baad.
Overall positive direction mein ja raha hai sab.
3star: Dekhte hain aage kya result aata hai.
